mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_message (session_id, role, content, message_type, question_index) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{questionIndex})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, role, content, message_type, question_index, created_at FROM interview_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND role = 'user'
SELECT id, session_id, role, content, message_type, question_index, created_at FROM interview_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_message SET content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE interview_message SET message_type = #{messageType}, question_index = #{questionIndex} WHERE id = #{id}
